title: Wongkamlao
original_title: วงษ์คำเหลา
overview: The story of Petcharawut, the heir of Wongkamlao Family, an extremely wealthy family that runs jewelry business, who falls in love with Piramon, who is an English tutor for his own younger brother. But the love affair between the rich and the poor always comes with conditions and obstacles.
